scope: Infusion failure parity, Arcane Workbench stale-output guard, Aura Node HUD ledger cleanup
changes: Added TC4InfusionFailureParity to route terminal matrix failures through the existing TC4 weighted instability event table.
Persisted recipefailure and recipefailinstability NBT for failure drift diagnostics.
Arcane Workbench shift-click output now checks mayPickup/canTakeStack before moving preview output.
Arcane Workbench output preview guard now compares item, NBT and count to prevent stale over-stacked previews.
Aura Node HUD aspect ordering and ring coordinates now come from TC4AuraNodeHudParity ledger.
parity_note: No new TC4 mechanics/items/recipes were added; this batch tightens existing adapters toward original 1.7.10 behavior.
